champions_subtitle: Click a champion to explore their tournaments
about_intro: Founded in 2015 in the heart of Brussels, The Square Chess Club has grown from a small group of 12 passionate players to a thriving community of over 95 members. We are proud to be Belgium's most dynamic and welcoming chess club.
mission_text: To make chess accessible, exciting and meaningful for everyone in Brussels — from absolute beginners discovering their first checkmate, to seasoned grandmasters pushing the limits of theory. We believe chess is more than a game: it is a training ground for the mind, a bridge between cultures, and a lifelong passion.
val1_desc: We pursue mastery in every game, every move, every decision — on and off the board.
val2_desc: Chess is our language. We welcome players of all backgrounds, ages and skill levels.
val3_desc: The best moves are the unexpected ones. We encourage bold, original thinking.
val4_desc: Fair play is non-negotiable. We compete with respect and grace, win or lose.
sponsors_subtitle: Proud partners who make The Square possible
sp2_desc: Brussels' historic chess café, fuelling our players since day one.
sp3_desc: Supporting youth chess education and student tournaments.
sp4_desc: Online platform partner providing tools and resources for our members.
sp5_desc: Helping us promote chess tourism in the heart of Europe.
sp6_desc: Logistics partner for our international tournament events.
contact_address: Rue de la Régence 14, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
